metadata.method: Real requests + browser automation, no mocking

vision_analysis.product_type: Frameless acrylic picture frame / wall-mounted display panel
vision_analysis.shape: Strict rectangular, portrait orientation, straight edges
vision_analysis.color: Transparent/clear with silver-toned metallic corner fasteners (brass)
vision_analysis.material_appearance: Clear acrylic (appears glass-like), polished metal hardware
vision_analysis.staging: Pure white seamless studio background, even diffused lighting, no props
notable_features: Four corner metal fasteners for wall mounting
Frameless transparent design blends into any wall
vision_analysis.scene_context: Studio product photography — isolated on white, clinical presentation

vision_analysis.shape: Rectangular tabletop with slightly rounded corners, four square legs, centered drawer unit with two sections
vision_analysis.color: Light natural wood — pale oak/ash, warm beige to light tan, uniform finish
vision_analysis.material_appearance: Solid wood or high-quality veneer, subtle grain, matte/satin finish, no gloss
vision_analysis.style: Strictly Minimalist, Scandinavian/Japanese — no ornamentation, clean lines, functional
vision_analysis.staging: Pure white seamless background, even diffuse lighting, no props
notable_features: Handle-less drawers — push-to-open, flush with frame
Four square legs positioned slightly inward
vision_analysis.scene_context: Studio product shot, isolated on white. No room context in gallery images.

vision_analysis.shape: Rectangular open backrest (two vertical stiles + flat top rail), concave ergonomic seat, four cylindrical slightly splayed legs, horizontal stretchers
vision_analysis.color: Light natural wood — warm beige/pale tan, consistent ash or beech tone
vision_analysis.material_appearance: Smooth polished wood, matte/satin finish, subtle fine grain
vision_analysis.style: Minimalist functional, Scandinavian design — clean lines, no ornamentation, natural material emphasis
vision_analysis.staging: Pure white background, soft diffuse studio lighting, subtle ground shadow only, no props
notable_features: Open backrest — light airy feel, no slats
Horizontal stretchers between front and back legs
Rounded edges throughout — soft approachable look
vision_analysis.scene_context: Studio product shot, isolated on white. No room context.

vision_analysis.product_type: Tall chest of drawers / dresser (5 drawers)
vision_analysis.shape: Tall rectangular prism, 5 drawers stacked vertically in single column, flush fronts
vision_analysis.color: Light natural wood — pale beige/tan, birch/beech tone, consistent across piece
vision_analysis.material_appearance: Wood veneer or solid panels, horizontal grain on drawer fronts, vertical grain on side, matte/satin finish
vision_analysis.style: Minimalist functional Japanese (MUJI) — handle-less, clean straight lines, no ornamentation
vision_analysis.staging: Pure white background, bright even diffuse lighting, soft shadow to left and beneath, no props
notable_features: Handle-less design — push-to-open or recessed grip mechanism
Horizontal grain on drawer fronts contrasts with vertical side grain
Drawer fronts flush with cabinet edges — seamless block look
Thin horizontal separator strips between drawers
vision_analysis.scene_context: Studio product shot, isolated on white. No room context.

scene_graph_template.description: MUJI product SceneGraph parameters for 3D scene generation
